name: All prices in the catalog are in Indian Rupees (INR), exclusive of applicable GS
description: All prices in the catalog are in Indian Rupees (INR), exclusive of applicable GST (18% on software and professional services).

name: The catalog covers Implementation CapEx pricing by workstream, Annual Managed Se
description: The catalog covers Implementation CapEx pricing by workstream, Annual Managed Services (AMS) OpEx by service tier, Software license structures, Optional and add-on modules, Volume-based pricing tiers for subscriber scale, and Payment milestone schedules.

name: The Five-Year Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) structure is contractually anchored
description: The Five-Year Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) structure is contractually anchored and applicable as a reference baseline for all comparable Tier-1 telecom BSS/OSS transformation engagements.
evidence: Five-Year Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Summary

description: Stream B (Software Deployment & Configuration) includes all BSS/OSS modules, 40+ integrations, and performance/security testing.

description: Stream C (Data Migration) involves 215M subscriber records, 24-month CDR history, and zero-revenue-leakage cutover.

description: Stream D (Training & Change Management) covers 200 super-users, 3,500+ ops staff, runbooks, and documentation.

description: Post-Go-Live Hypercare includes 90-day war-room support per phase with a 24x7 dedicated team.
